match.userMessage:
Overhead flat-lay wide composition of SCARLETT wearing a linen shirt stepping into the shallows at the Bondi Beach shoreline, one foot entering the gentle incoming wave breaking at her ankle while the coral lipstick rolls from her open palm and lands beside the stamped brand mark in the wet pale sand amid patches of sea foam, late-afternoon glow warming the entire frame with natural coastal light casting soft directional shadows across the textures of sand and water, captured in a modern social-first product photography style emphasizing tactile real-life interaction, clean bright color rendering with true-to-life tones and slight warmth in highlights.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - Wet sand shoreline with incoming waves and sea foam
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
